ops.text: Remove GPU optimization limits to prevent checkerboarding and force immediate content visibility.
Inject pinch-to-zoom and wheel-zoom event listeners directly into the iframe's internal document to bypass event swallowing.
Switch from pageX/Y to screenX/Y to prevent transform coordinate feedback loops during pinch-to-zoom.
Implement high-performance pinch-to-zoom with direct DOM manipulation, scroll compensation, and dynamic minScale bounds.
Add horizontal padding to Miron Challenges to prevent text cut-off.
Wrap iframe and parent touchmove events in requestAnimationFrame locks for buttery smooth scaling.
Fix Context Menu scaling glitch via DOM wrapping and implement boundary clamping for perfect positioning.
Implement spatial awareness to spawn the context menu intelligently above or below the text, preventing overlap.
Refine Context Menu positioning: Default to spawning below text, and strictly clamp spawning and dragging coordinates to the visible viewport.
